title: Travel vaccination counseling
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.
assessment.rationale: Supports itinerary, duration, purpose and consultation context for travel vaccination counselling; no decision is generated.

source.title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
source.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
source.setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting traveler health background, itinerary, trip purpose, activities, prior travel, immunization and medicine context and individualized risk assessment; no vaccine, medicine, dose or advice is mapped.

exact_location.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_location.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

assessment.text: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.
assessment.rationale: Supports immunisation history, health background and destination-risk documentation for travel vaccination counselling; no decision is generated.

source.title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation
source.population: International travelers, preserving itinerary, destination, duration, purpose, activity, age, pregnancy, immune status, chronic illness and special-risk qualifiers.
source.setting: Pre-travel consultation in travel-medicine or primary-care settings, with specialist input for complex travelers.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting traveler health background, itinerary, trip purpose, activities, prior travel, immunization and medicine context and individualized risk assessment; no vaccine, medicine, dose or advice is mapped.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.

assessment.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered contraindication and precaution assessment for travel vaccination counselling; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
